coverage_note: The bundled CYP2D6 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from CYP2D6 phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000100197: CYP2D6 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: CYP2D6 findings should be read against phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs3892097 (CYP2D6*4 splice marker) is curated as a CYP2D6 marker for CYP2D6 pharmacogenomics context, Drug exposure and adverse-response biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

CYP2D6 copy-number/star-allele model is curated as a CYP2D6 marker for CYP2D6 pharmacogenomics context, Drug exposure and adverse-response biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
